elements.content:
https://rystal.itch.io/less-is-more
Eating blue orbs shrunk your size, 
Eating red orbs increased size.

https://ahmedmostafa.itch.io/less-is-more

Game interprets <=> into damage, More than damage, Less than damage.

Game Name :Interpret 
Mini games stuffed full of examples of how "less Is more" Could be interpreted.

Mini platformer,
Base output = 0.
> = Heal
< = Damage

Player shoots out nanobots - These repair or destroy,
Enemies need destroying,
Walls need repairing to open

Using < when shooting at Ground / Wall / Ceiling = Push away. 
Using > = Suck towards

Mini platformer, 
Your main goal is to simplify, reduce visual noise. Increase clarity of the world- and find the exit
Noise could be from enemies emitting distortion waves distorting what you see in that area
Noise could be from traps sending out deadly noise waves in a rhythmic pattern allowing you to destroy them

https://trousers.itch.io/par-for-the-dungeon
Golf game,
Moves cost Coins,
Coins can be used to buy arrows,
Arrows don't cost moves, meaning no gold used.

Top down puzzle
Save energy by doing less moves, but completing all goals.
Move the player by dragging in the opposite direction. Hitting the enemy  gains an energy,

Shop:
Player can buy lightning bolts from the shop. 
Attacking with bolts doesn't cost energy
